syntax:
## JavaScript Conditionals Cheat Sheet

### If/Else
```javascript
if (condition) { ... }
else if (other) { ... }
else { ... }
```

### Ternary
```javascript
const result = condition ? valueIfTrue : valueIfFalse;
```

### Nullish Coalescing
```javascript
const name = user.name ?? 'Guest'; // if null/undefined
```

### Optional Chaining
```javascript
const city = user?.address?.city; // no error if undefined
```

### Common Pitfalls
- Use `===` not `==` (strict equality)
- `0`, `""`, `null`, `undefined` are falsy
- `switch` falls through — always `break`

commonErrors.description: Calling variables outside their declared scope.

interviewNotes: Be ready to explain scoping rules and time/space characteristics.
bestPractices: Use const / final for read-only variables.
memoryTricks: Think of scopes as Russian nesting dolls — inside dolls can see outside, but outside cannot see inside.
quickRevision: Variables store data. Loops repeat blocks. Functions encapsulate tasks. Objects bundle states.
